description: Binary assertion test suite for PRD Skill self-improvement loop (Karpathy pattern). Each assertion must be objectively true/false — no subjective judgments.

tests.prompt: Create a PRD for a mobile habit tracking app, engineering audience

assertions.text: Document contains an Executive Summary section
Executive Summary states the problem before the solution
Document contains a North Star Metric section
All user stories have a unique ID starting with US-
All acceptance criteria use Given/When/Then format
Goals section contains at least one numeric target value
Out-of-scope items are explicitly listed in the Scope section
Document contains an Error States section
Document contains a Privacy and Compliance section
Document contains at least one embedded visual element or chart reference

tests.prompt: Create a PRD for an AI-powered customer support chatbot for an enterprise SaaS company

assertions.text: Document contains an AI Feature Specification section
AI section includes a hallucination rate target or quality metric
Document contains User Flows with numbered steps
Document contains a Launch Checklist section
Document mentions GDPR or relevant compliance regulation
User stories use both User Story and Job Story (JTBD) format for at least one requirement
Telemetry section lists specific events to track
Document has a cover page with a Goal Type field
Risk section contains at least 3 distinct risks
Timeline section contains at least 2 milestones with feature lists

tests.prompt: Create a client-facing PRD for an e-commerce platform redesign — stakeholder presentation

assertions.text: Document contains a Competitive Analysis section or comparison
Executive Summary leads with the business problem, not the solution
Goals section includes ROI or business value metric
Document contains at least one user persona with name and role
Success metrics are specific and measurable with numeric targets
Document contains a Scope section with explicit out-of-scope items
Timeline section present with milestone names and dates or durations
Document contains an Accessibility Requirements section
Risk section includes at least one risk with a specific mitigation plan
Appendix or glossary section present

tests.prompt: Write a PRD for a B2B SaaS analytics dashboard for financial reporting — MVP scope

assertions.text: Document contains a North Star Metric
Goal Type is specified (Learning/Validating/Prototyping/MVP/Production)
User Flows section present with step-by-step navigation
Privacy and Compliance section mentions financial data regulations
Technical Architecture section present with component description
All user story IDs follow US-XXX format
MoSCoW prioritization applied to at least 3 requirements
Error States section covers at least 2 failure scenarios
Telemetry section present with at least 3 events to track
Launch Checklist section present

tests.prompt: Create a PRD for a real-time team collaboration tool with file sharing — startup, product launch

assertions.text: Go-To-Market or Launch section present
North Star Metric defined
At least one A/B Test Plan entry or testing hypothesis mentioned
User Flows section with step-by-step collaborative workflows
Privacy section covers file storage and sharing data
Technical Architecture includes real-time component description
Accessibility Requirements section present
Launch Checklist section with at least 3 categories
Error States covers offline or connection failure scenario
Risk section includes at least one technical risk with mitigation
